basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Guest Faculty (Chinese) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 08 July 2026 at the Panjab University office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in Chinese language, Literature, or allied discipline, NET/SET or Ph.D. exemption as per UGC norms
qualification.details: Master's Degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Chinese language, Literature, or allied discipline from an Indian or accredited foreign university; NET/SET or Ph.D. exemption as per UGC norms.

salary_details.details: Rs.1500/- per lecture with upper limit of Rs.50,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Guest Faculty (Chinese) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Panjab University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Panjab University Guest Faculty (Chinese) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's Degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Chinese language, Literature, or allied discipline from an Indian or accredited foreign university; NET/SET or Ph.D. exemption as per UGC norms.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Guest Faculty (Chinese) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Panjab University Guest Faculty (Chinese) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Panjab University Guest Faculty (Chinese) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Panjab University recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Panjab University recruitment is Guest Faculty (Chinese).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty (Chinese) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Guest Faculty (Chinese) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview date is 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty (Chinese) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Master's degree with 55% marks in Chinese language, Literature, or allied discipline, along with NET/SET or Ph.D. exemption as per UGC norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty (Chinese) position?
faq.answer: The salary structure is Rs. 1500/- per lecture with an upper limit of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Panjab University office.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.
